message:
fix: improve HTML template structure and HOME environment handling

template.rs:
- Wrap header content in header-content div for proper traffic light
  positioning (CSS ::before pseudo-element for terminal-style dots)
- Fix indentation of meta items in header-meta div
- Update comment to clarify terminal-style traffic light design

install.rs:
- Improve HOME environment variable resolution in SystemInfo tests
- Fall back to directories::BaseDirs when HOME env var is empty or unset
- Prevents test failures in containerized environments without HOME set

probe.rs:
- Ensure HOME is set before running probe script via bash
- Check if HOME env var exists, if not use directories::BaseDirs
- Pass HOME to child process environment explicitly
- Prevents probe script failures in test/CI environments

These changes improve robustness in environments where HOME may not
be set (Docker, CI runners, restricted shells) while maintaining
the visual design intent of the HTML export.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
